title: Bajaj Allianz General is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Bajaj Allianz General is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!
